---
title: "IFCD044 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


<style>
tr:nth-child(0) {
  background-color: #b2b2b2!important;
  color: #f4f4f4!important;
}
</style>


![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

## ``Sprint#4: Approaches Multi-Agent App III`` (July 2026)

::: {.column-page-right}
| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #4 | 14 |  20/07/2026 | - Planning Spring#4  </br> - The divided mind: delusion </br> </br>  - Four different cognitive load, time-boxing and job-type in *SCRUM events*: </br> **(1) Planning**: listing, pareto, goal, time management, decisionMaking  </br> **(2) Executing**: creativity, getting thinks done, Albertus' dilemma, problem-solving, focus  </br> **(3) Reviewing**: anti-fragile, feedback analysis, listening, communication, selling  </br> **(4) Reflecting**: metrics, impediments, understanding, optimal solution, decisionMaking, meeting rules   | - [Delusion](/scrum/scrum-articles-dellusion.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Tests](/scrum/scrumlab5.qmd){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 15 | 21/07/2026 | - Nicholas Taleb Week#05: **antifragile / skin in the game**</br></br> -<s> Beyond SCRUM and Before SCRUM </BR>  - Mental Energy: basics</s> </BR></BR>  ++ Approaches Multi-Agent App III mockup app with: </br>(1) Spring Boot </br>(2) Thymeleaf </br>(3) H2 local </br>(4) and Spring AI  </br>(5) deploy: Railway & docker |  - [Week#10](/scrum/scrum-week10.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Week#14](/scrum/scrum-week14.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Brain Energy](/books/brainenergy.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/springboot-th.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Github project](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mockup-multiapproachAI){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 16 | 22/07/2026 | - Prova Pràctiva and Prova Objectiva </br></br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App III mockup app with: </br>(1) Spring Boot AI Thymeleaf + H2 local  </br>(2) deploy: Railway & docker </br> (3) **DevOps pipeline: agent, script, docker and deployment** </br> </br> - <s>Beyond SCRUM and Before SCRUM</s>   |    - [Github project](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mockup-multiapproachAI){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Ponderacions](https://albertprofe.dev/ifcd044-26/ifcd044-26.html#ponderaci%C3%B3-de-les-avaluacions-i-de-la-prova-final){.external target='_blank'}  </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/deploy-agent.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} |
|  | 17 | 23/07/2026 |     - **Decision Making** </br>  - Steps to decision making: </br> (1) info, purpose, mental-energy </br>  (2) place, time, ritual </br>  (3) decision comes to you via intuition   </br>  - How to create **your own Clear Thinking** to make good decisions </br> (1) physical path: nutrition, exercise, stress, mental health </br> (2) own habits to create context where you make decisions: music, walk, sea or mountain, silence, shower </br>  (3) learn to recognize intuition  |    - [Week#15](/scrum/scrum-week15.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> |
|  | 18 | 24/07/2026 |  - Approaches Multi-Agent App: Revision and Retrospective </br></br> - Books: Status Game, Mindset, The righteous mind, Time management, Mind management  </br></br> - We face impediments to understand our client through iterations and goals. </br>This understanding in key to decision making and finding out the proper balances:</br>(1) mindset: fixed, growth, survival</br>(2) anti-fragile and lateralization</br>(3) identity, change and moral emotions (status game and rider/elephant)</br>(4) productivity vs. creativity  |     |
: Sprint #4  Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Legend"}
- `-` > topic planned and **done**
- `- ` <s>done</s> > topic not done in class (**pending**)
- `++` > not-planned new topic
:::
